candidate.notes: different labels in same place place_00000

object_a.label: picture frame
object_a.long_form_open_description: Medium-sized square picture frame with a darker border and a nautical-themed image (sailboat) centered on the stair wall at about eye level. Matte and frame create a small shadow on the wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Hangs on the sloped stair wall between two other framed pictures and above the baseboard
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Medium-sized square picture frame with a darker border and a nautical-themed image (sailboat) centered on the stair wall at about eye level. Matte and frame create a small shadow on the wall.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: center sector | Medium-sized square picture frame with a darker border and a nautical-themed image (sailboat) centered on the stair wall at about eye level. Matte and frame create a small shadow on the wall.

object_b.label: window
object_b.description: pair of vertical windows with blinds flanking the fireplace
object_b.long_form_open_description: Two narrow, vertical double-hung style windows with white blinds; one on each side of the fireplace. They allow daylight into the room and have simple trim matching the mantel. Blinds are partially closed, diffusing light.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: one window to left of fireplace, one to right; both frame the mantel and TV
object_b.object_text_short: pair of vertical windows with blinds flanking the fireplace
